pivot_strategies: Audit the sales pipeline for drop-off points between lead and close.
A/B test proposal formats and pricing structures.
Implement a CRM-based follow-up cadence (3-touch minimum post-demo).
Add a discovery call script with structured objection-handling playbook.
Introduce social proof assets (case studies, testimonials) at decision stage.
Launch a LinkedIn outreach campaign targeting ICP (Ideal Customer Profile).
Deploy a lead magnet (checklist, audit, or free assessment) to capture top-of-funnel.
Activate referral program with existing clients — offer 10% revenue share.
Run monthly webinars or workshops aligned to core service offerings.
Invest in local SEO and Google Business Profile optimization for inbound leads.
Convert project-based clients to monthly retainer agreements.
Bundle services into tiered packages (Basic / Growth / Enterprise).
Introduce a recurring revenue product (e.g., monthly advisory call, dashboard access).
Diversify revenue streams — add a second service line with low delivery overhead.
Create a 6-month revenue forecast model to identify seasonal dips and pre-sell.

kpi_targets.Retainer_conversion_target: 50% of active clients on retainer within 90 days

pivot_strategies: Proceed with full automation pipeline deployment (Agent #5+).
Focus on scaling lead volume to capture growth headroom.
Invest in SEO and content strategy to compound inbound traffic.
Begin delegation and SOPs to reduce founder-dependency.
Model 30/90/180-day growth projections (Agent #7).
